cells.rationale: Correctness/security-critical: the index-purity gate + pathspec-limited commit is the structural defense that stops a poisoned index leaking into the commit tree. Subtle git-tree invariants (rename-completeness A/D halves, git --only worktree window, GIT_LITERAL_PATHSPECS injection defense) where a wrong abstraction silently corrupts the tree; a hard opus correctness gate, xhigh for the contract-shaped git semantics.

Adds a deterministic-replay fold arm plus a new synthetic-event round-trip and requires a cross-cutting audit that the jam-promotion perturbs no escalation-cap/readiness/dispatch path. Event-sourcing correctness invariant (fold determinism/idempotence, schema defaults) over a multi-file cascade; opus gate, xhigh for the new-event contract shape.

Layered defensive commit gates: fail-open keeper.db read, defensive cat-file --batch-check parsing, the dir-parity normalization silent-failure risk, and worktree-portable in-progress probes. Correctness-critical with subtle failure modes where a mis-normalized compare silently no-ops the whole gate; opus gate, xhigh.

Well-specified additive wire-validator change (add repair to the retry_dispatch allowlist) with a named root cause and explicit scope guards (no reducer/db change); the reasoning core is a bounded call-site disjointness audit across isEscalationVerb/RETRY_DISPATCH_VERBS consumers. No novel design or Claude taste needed, GPT-first; gpt-5.5's multi-step-agentic-coding sweet spot fits the audit-across-files, high band for a known-pattern change.
